sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_years (id INTEGER, interval_year INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO test_years (id, interval_year) VALUES (1, to_years(5));
INSERT INTO test_years (id, interval_year) VALUES (2, to_years(10));
UPDATE test_years SET interval_year = to_years(3) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, interval_year FROM test_years WHERE interval_year > to_years(4);
